description: Create a storable product named 'Alpine Performance Jacket' (Internal Reference: APJ-BASE) with a sales price of $189.00 and a cost of $85.00. Configure the product with attributes for Size (S, M, L, XL) and Color (Navy Blue, Forest Green, Charcoal). Apply price extras for the XL size (+$15.00) and the Forest Green color (+$10.00). Set the sales description to: 'Premium weather-resistant jacket with adjustable hood and thermal insulation. Suitable for hiking and outdoor activities.'
